ddls:
CREATE TABLE "kingdoms" (
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kingdom */,
  "kingdom_name" TEXT /* Name of the kingdom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* The scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "kingdom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kingdom the species belongs to */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species (e.g., Chordata) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species (e.g., Aves, Reptilia) */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species (e.g., Galliformes) */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species (e.g., Phasianidae) */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "appendix" TEXT /* Conservation status appendix (e.g., App. I, App. II) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_kingdom_id FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom_id") REFERENCES kingdoms ("kingdom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being assessed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Conservation status category (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the conservation status assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding conservation efforts or changes */,
  "criteria_met" INTEGER /* Whether the species meets the criteria for the assigned category */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the population (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "geographic_range" TEXT /* Geographic range of the species */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Threats to the species (e.g., habitat loss, hunting, climate change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat present in the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_region" (
  "species_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species-region relationship */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the species is found */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the species in the region */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the population in the region (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_region_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation program */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_program" (
  "species_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species-program relationship */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation program */,
  "program_role" TEXT /* Role of the species in the program (e.g., target species, indicator species) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_program_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_program_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES conservation_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation effort */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being conserved */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation program */,
  "effort_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation effort (e.g., habitat restoration, species reintroduction) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conservation effort */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conservation effort */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the conservation effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_efforts_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_efforts_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES conservation_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring data record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being monitored */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the species is monitored */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date of monitoring */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the species at the time of monitoring */,
  "habitat_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the habitat at the time of monitoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being researched */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the research paper */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the research paper was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
